allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)","$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Recurse -Filter "rpi-imager.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell(Get-Disk | Where-Object { $_.BusType -in 'USB','SD' } | Select-Object Number, FriendlyName, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Size/1GB,1\)}}, BusType, OperationalStatus | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Disk | Select-Object Number, FriendlyName, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Size/1GB,1\)}}, BusType, IsBoot, IsSystem | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(\(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source)

PowerShell($k="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InJodHljbXJrcGp4bGZ4Z3lmZXRlIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3ODI5MzcyNTcsImV4cCI6MjA5ODUxMzI1N30.OUOQy6ZBaiXK1rooQre-SLqQxOyqSc9qbU3RWIaQIwM"; Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://rhtycmrkpjxlfxgyfete.supabase.co/rest/v1/messages" -Headers @{apikey=$k; Authorization="Bearer $k"; "Content-Type"="application/json"; Prefer="return=representation"} -Body '{"text":"Welcome to the new message board! 🎉","type":"success","label":"TEST","priority":1}' | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($k="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InJodHljbXJrcGp4bGZ4Z3lmZXRlIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3ODI5MzcyNTcsImV4cCI6MjA5ODUxMzI1N30.OUOQy6ZBaiXK1rooQre-SLqQxOyqSc9qbU3RWIaQIwM"; $png=[Convert]::FromBase64String\("iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNkYPhfDwAChwGA60e6kgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg=="\); Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://rhtycmrkpjxlfxgyfete.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/board-photos/test_upload.png" -Headers @{apikey=$k; Authorization="Bearer $k"; "Content-Type"="image/png"} -Body $png; Invoke-WebRequest -Method Head "https://rhtycmrkpjxlfxgyfete.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/board-photos/test_upload.png" | Select-Object StatusCode)
PowerShell(git -C C:\\apps add admin.html display.html SETUP-COMPLETE.md SETUP-all-in-one.sql pi-kiosk-extracted 2>&1)
PowerShell(git -C C:\\apps -c user.name="Randy Kraft" -c user.email="randy.kraft@gmail.com" commit -m "Message board: display + admin pages, setup docs, pi kiosk scripts" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Volume | Where-Object DriveLetter | Select-Object DriveLetter, FileSystemLabel, FileSystem, @{n='SizeGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Size/1GB,1\)}} | Format-Table)

PowerShell(git -C C:\\apps -c user.name="Randy Kraft" -c user.email="randy.kraft@gmail.com" commit -m "Visual redesign: glass message card with type-tinted accent, 3-zone strip \(weather + ticker always visible\), ambient drift, night dim, progress dots, admin live preview" 2>&1)
